sources.desc: Peter Van Norden, the actor who appeared in Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment and The Naked Gun 2½: The Smell of Fear, has died. He was 75. The actor’s wife Wendy was by his side as he died peacefully Thursday morning in a Southern California hospice facility, where he was struggling with multiple health […]

stories.headline: Box Office: ‘Moana’ Makes $18 Million on Opening Day
stories.summary: Although “Moana” led the box office on Friday, the live-action remake didn’t make the domestic splash Disney was probably hoping for. “Moana” made just $18 million on Friday from 3,875 North American theaters. Rival estimates have it grossing $45 million through opening weekend, which is below the $56 million the original “Moana” earned over its […]

sources.title: ‘Moana’ Paddling To Underwhelming $42M-$46M U.S. Opening, But Lands A- CinemaScore – Saturday Box Office Update
sources.desc: SATURDAY AM: Disney’s live-action Moana wound up with a better than expected Friday/previews of $18M and an A- CinemaScore, underscoring the sheer divide between audience and critics on this Dwayne Johnson movie. Also, Moana earned an overall A with women, and an A+ with the under 18 demo. But Maui and the Island Princess are […]

movies.title: Obsession
movies.overview: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.

movies.title: The Sheep Detectives
movies.overview: Every night a shepherd reads aloud a murder mystery, pretending his sheep can understand. When he is found dead, the sheep realize at once that it was a murder and think they know everything about how to go about solving it.

movies.title: Project Hail Mary
movies.overview: A science teacher wakes up alone on a spaceship. As his memory returns, he uncovers a mission to stop a mysterious substance killing Earth's sun, and realizes that an unexpected friendship may be the key.

movies.title: Backrooms
movies.overview: After a therapist's patient disappears into a dimension beyond reality, she must venture into the unknown to save him.

movies.title: Citizen Vigilante
movies.overview: A man takes justice into his own hands, hunting down criminals. His vigilante crusade makes him a social media star but puts him at odds with the local police chief.

shows.title: I Will Find You
shows.overview: A father imprisoned for his son's murder receives evidence suggesting his child may be alive, compelling him to escape and uncover the truth.

shows.title: Dutton Ranch
shows.overview: Beth Dutton and Rip Wheeler fight to survive on their cherished 7,000-acre ranch amid tough times and stiff competition, while ensuring young Carter becomes the man he's supposed to be.

shows.title: Elle
shows.overview: Follows Elle Woods' journey through high school, exploring the formative experiences that mold her into the iconic, confident "Legally Blonde" character.

shows.title: Widow's Bay
shows.overview: A skeptical mayor leads the superstitious residents of a cursed New England island.

shows.title: Off Campus
shows.overview: A college-set romantic drama chronicling the unexpected love story between a music student and the university's star hockey player, exploring themes of love and the complexities of adulthood through deep friendships and enduring b...

anime.title: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- Season 4
anime.overview: The fourth season of Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu .

anime.title: Daemons of the Shadow Realm
anime.overview: In a remote mountain village under the watchful eyes of two stone guardians, the young Yuru contentedly lives off the land while staying close to the only family he has left—Asa, his precious twin sister.…

anime.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation Season 3
anime.overview: The third season of Mushoku Tensei: Isekai Ittara Honki Dasu .

anime.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Season 4
anime.overview: The fourth season of Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken .

anime.title: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You
anime.overview: At age forty-five, office worker Sasaki has had enough of the corporate grind. His only solace is smoking-and the friendly smile of supermarket cashier Yamada. When Sasaki can't fi…

wotd.def: A remedy believed to cure all disease and prolong life that was originally sought by alchemists; a cure-all.
